title: Zambia Revenue Authority (Amendment) Act, 2024

sections.title: The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 18 Repeal and

sections.title: An action or other proceedings shall not lie or Immunity of
sections.body:

staff

Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
